title: perilla frutescens
intro: Perilla frutescens, also known as Chinese basil or shiso, is a member of the mint family and a traditional medicinal plant used in Asian cultures. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of perilla frutescens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Perilla frutescens can be used in various herbal preparations, such as tea, oil, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
